commit.subject: LU-3285 osd: use 4K blocksize for MDT files on ZFS
commit.message:
LU-3285 osd: use 4K blocksize for MDT files on ZFS

Use 4K blocksize for files on MDT with ZFS.

Signed-off-by: Mikhal Pershin <mike.pershin@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ia77a90dadbe5c79671e7ac624a842d6db2d8c704
